abort.no_gateways: No gateways were found for your account.
abort.reauth_wrong_account: You can only reauthenticate this entry with the same Overkiz account and hub
abort.reconfigure_wrong_account: You can only reconfigure this entry with the same Overkiz account and hub

error.application_not_allowed: Your setup cannot be accessed through this application.
error.certificate_verify_failed: Cannot connect to host, certificate verify failed.
error.developer_mode_disabled: Developer Mode disabled. Activate the Developer Mode of your Somfy TaHoma box first.
error.no_such_token: Cannot create a token for this gateway. Please confirm if the account is linked to this gateway.
error.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts with an invalid token, temporarily banned
error.too_many_requests: Too many requests, try again later
error.unsupported_hardware: Your {unsupported_device} hardware is not using the Overkiz platform and can't be supported by this integration.

data_description.password: The password of your cloud account (app).
data_description.username: The username of your cloud account (app).

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Overkiz hub.
data_description.token: Token generated by the app used to control your device.
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify the SSL certificate. Select this only if you are connecting via the hostname.

local.description:
To connect locally, you need a [compatible gateway]({local_api_docs}) and an API token. How you generate the token depends on your gateway, see the [Overkiz documentation]({token_docs}) for instructions.

Then enter the generated token below and set the host to your Gateway PIN or the IP address of your gateway.

data_description.api_type: The local API is only available on [certain gateways]({local_api_docs}). Climate devices and scenarios are **not** available via the local API.

local_or_cloud.description: Choose how you want to connect to your gateway.

data_description.gateway_id: Select the gateway you want to add.

select_gateway.description: Select the gateway you want to control with Home Assistant.

data_description.hub: Select the mobile app that you use to control your devices.

user.description: Select your server. The Overkiz platform is used by various vendors like Somfy (Connexoon / TaHoma), Hitachi (Hi Kumo) and Atlantic (Cozytouch).

unsupported_set_position_and_tilt.message: This device does not support setting position and tilt simultaneously.

set_cover_position_and_tilt.description: Moves the cover and tilt to the target position simultaneously, preventing the motor from stopping between movements.

position.description: Target vertical position. 0 means closed, 100 means fully open.
position.name: Position

tilt_position.description: Target tilt position. 0 means closed, 100 means fully open.
tilt_position.name: Tilt position

set_cover_position_and_tilt.name: Set cover position and tilt
